posts.author: KinBW (Kinga)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

I am creating a new Monday.com form for one of our courses, and I noticed that there is ‘Update question’ thingy in settings that is ticked and I can’t untick it. In result, just above the submit button on the form there is a text box (completely not needed and unwanted) which if is filled, goes to ‘conversation’ in a new item. Does anyone know why I can’t untick it and also knows how to get rid off it?

Thanks in advance
Kinga
